items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Access and visibility controls by account scope', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the business process, such as booking and financial outputs, but do not include any checks or reads related to access and visibility controls. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
